feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Mass Change Equipment User Status using Master Data Info. center Fiori tile - Error
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

When trying to mass change the user status of equipment using the "Master Data Information Center" Fiori tile, bellow error message appears. 

"Status is not user status"

The list contained only 5 equipment which are having the initial status of "INIT" and intended to change to next status "INSE". (list does not contain any Functional locations)

Following is the user status profile and it does not contain any dependencies,

Any possible reason for the error message (message itself is not helpful - no error details or ID)

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Manage work center capacity for maintenance order
entry.content:
Dear,

When implementing SAP Asset Management S/4HANA Public Edition for a client, one of the requests is the following: being able to check the capacities available of a work center before assigning hours to an operation.

I know that there is the Work Center Utilization app via the license Resource Scheduling (43R) but we want to know if there is an equivalent to check the capacities without this license.

I have found a Production tile: Manage Work Center Capacity. I have defined, in My Area Of Responsibility, a work center group that I have created by including my maintenance work center in it.

The issue that I have is that I do not see the percentage of the utilization of my maintenance operations, yet I cannot see the work planned (see my pictures attached) > the utilization is empty for my work center RES-0100; Capacities are available in the header of my work center & my maintenance order operations are either ready to schedule or dispatched already.

Can you please help and let me know if there is a configuration missing or another alternative to check capacity planning without the Resource Scheduling app?

Thank you,

Dany R.

entry.title: Enable maintenance order scheduled start and scheduled finish date
entry.content:
We need to enable scheduled start and scheduled finish date in maintenance order so that user can maintain the required scheduled start and scheduled finish date. Standard sap system is not allowing to change the scheduled start and end date. Please provide the appropriate solution to maintain the Scheduled dates in maintenance order.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Is there a way to get my PM orders with a basic start & finish dates 1 month apart?
entry.content:
Dear experts,

Is there a way to get my scheduled preventive maintenance orders having basic start date at the beginning of the month and the basic finish at the end of the month? I plan to have this automated for all work orders.

entry.title: development, quality, production -- these are called servers or landscapes or environment?
entry.content:
development, quality, production -- these are called servers or landscapes or environment?

Some call them as servers, some call them as systems, some call them as landscapes, some call them as environment.

What exactly these are? Servers? Systems? Landscapes? or Environment?

entry.title: Fleet Management SAP PM - two fuel cards
entry.content:
Dear all,

for all vehicles created as equipment we might need to add a second fuel card. Is there any possiblity to do so? If not, could you suggest maybe a good way to meet this requirement.

Thanks a lot,

Sunnyi

entry.title: Meas points not showing up in IW42 even when linked to the Task List via PRTs for operation of FLOC.
entry.content:
I want the business to enter the measurement readings whle posting a confirmation. 

 

For this I created a Meas Point and then assigned it to the Tasklist for my FLOC.  

 

 

 

After this I created an order and released it. And I setup my profile to show the means points / counter readings. 



 

My Tasklist for my FLOC has these PRTs:

Now for order I went to IW42. 

When I click on this button, it does not populate the means points.

I have to use this option to pull up all the means points and then enter the values. 


Can you advise what I am missing?

entry.title: How to configure SAP to do not allow creation of Notification/Work orders for FLOCs and EQUI
entry.content:
SAP Experts

There is a list of Functional locations and equipment that are planned to be either demolished or decommissioned in the next couple of years. From a cost reduction perspective, I am looking for an option in SAP to allow users to choose whether or not a notification should be created.

I already found some articles suggesting creating new statuses in SAP, however, this option is not possible, due to restrictions to create new statuses in the System. To use DLFL and INAC also is not an option, because there will be exception cases, in it will be necessary to create a notification

entry.title: Where to define the partners list (person responsible inside the work order)
entry.content:
Hello,

I searched in the web but I didn't found any answer to my question. 

Where I can add the list of person responsible that I have to insert inside the person responsible field? Now is empty. I don't know how to have the values to be inserted in that field. 

Thank you,

entry.title: Unable to add 'notification item' using BADI NOTIF_EVENT_SAVE
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to add a notification item by default when creating a plant maintenance notification.

I am passing the values required in the BADI NOTIF_EVENT_SAVE. However, I do not get the item included after the notification creation.

Any clues?

Regards,
Ramesh-

entry.title: Scheduling parameters usage & what is forward scheduling & backward scheduling in maintenance orders
entry.content:
Dear Sir,

I have doubts regarding the topic Scheduling parameters while configuring the maintenance order types.

What are Scheduling parameters & what is forward scheduling & backward scheduling in maintenance orders.

What is the meaning of scheduling type.

What is the meaning of production supervisor *, while doing the configuration of maintenance order scheduling setting.

What is the difference between automatic scheduling, automatic log, scheduling with breaks, shift order, latest staging date.

 

Regards,

Arif

entry.title: Auto close/update all open Notifications work orders and maintenance plans for Decommissioned asset
entry.content: How we can achieve this please let me know

entry.title: Maintenance Order Components - PR should create with Equipment serial numbers.
entry.content:
Hi Guru's

Equipments are maintained with the serial numbers. If any maintenance order created with components for the equipment. PR need to be created for the components with equipment serial number. Then vendor will provide the appropriate components based on the equipment serial number for the PR. Is there any solution to fulfill the above business process?

entry.title: MB51 report
entry.content:
Hi,

In MB51 we are not getting cost center for which we have issued (261) goods against maintenance order

i have tried with query by linking table VIAFKOS MSEG and MKPF but in this i am getting output only for material issue against maintenance order (261) and not 201 which we have issued some material against cost center.

how can we get a report like MB51 which also contains cost center for GI agnst maintenance order?

entry.title: Differences between SAP MRS , FSM and RSH
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are working on a requirement for  Resource Scheduling for one of our client.

SAP has 3 products available i.e. MRS , FSM and RSH.

Can someone tell me what are the usages of those and the differences between them? 

Thanks and Regards,

S Kumar

entry.title: PPE tcode
entry.content:
Hi, 

I want to update source code in PPE transaction. is there any bapi or function module to update?

Thnx in advance 🙂

entry.title: How i select work center category 5 for plant maintenance
entry.content: Hi expert in transaction IR01 i have the next problem when i tried to select work center category for plant maintenance.

entry.title: Proactive Order (YA02) is not generating with Notifiction type (Y2) and giving error while schedulin
entry.content:
Hello All,

Proactive Order (YA02) is not generating with Notification type (Y2) and giving error while scheduling from Maintenance Plan. Client do not want to generate Notification as call object. Requirement is to generate Order as call object. While generating it is giving APRQ error. Process is working fine if we are generating notification first and creating order manually. Is it possible to generate order and skip the approval part for notification or we can do auto approval while creation. Kindly suggest.

Regards

Yogesh Sharma

entry.title: Equipment/Functional location Manufacturer Serial number --> Order --> PR
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

Equipment/Functional location has manufacturer serial number. Maintenance order is created for the equipment/Functional location with spare parts. Dependent requirement was generated against the order for all spare parts. After MRP run, Purchase Requisition was generated for spares.

In Purchase Requisition, we need to map the equipment/Functional location manufacturer serial number.

Business process:

Vendor will see the manufacturer serial number in the PR and provide the exact spare parts based on the manufacturer serial number.

Is there any way to flow the equipment/functional location manufacturer serial number to PR?

entry.title: NOTIFICATION FOR FAILED MEASURING POINT VALUES
entry.content:
When doing a Plant Maintenance Work Order confirmation and recording Failed Notifications against more than one Measuring Point on the Technical Object, Only one Notification (type M9) is raised for the Confirmation with the description matching the Text entered for the last failed measuring point. Our business wants one (for better or worse) per failed Measuring point.
i.e. 3 Fails => 3 notifications.

Is this possible and if so how?

Regards

Seamus Norris
